name: frontier_tower
description: Battle Tower hall end-to-end, MANAGER-OWNED (FrontierManager tower climb): the streak climb is nine floors incl. the lobby - eight fights, floors 2-8 level-locked 40->88 alternating Jasper/Mira re-manned per floor (locked fights flatten CLONES, attrition-free), floor 9 is Tower Tycoon Palmer at full authored strength (REAL fight). Dialog do:battle buttons are GONE - Jasper's lobby desk carries 'Take the lift' (frontier tower climb, as_player); floors 4-9 climb via rcon execute-as (same command surface). WIN SIGNAL is the manager, not trainer win_lines: per floor expect the climb banner ('Floor N of 9 ... flattened to <lock> ... Purse <purse> CD'), then '[Frontier] Purse paid: <purse> CD', then 'The lift hums. Floor N+1 is open' (NOTE: the Java line has no 'of 9'); progression asserted via the frontier_tower_floor score. Palmer's win sets defeated_frontier_brain_tower + frontier_tower_cleared and fires frontier/hall_cleared ('A Frontier hall falls.' + #halls recount) - his old win_line tail lives in beaten say[2] now. NEEDLE RULE (safari_yards precedent): manager lines are Component.literal with embedded section-sign codes and HudLog stores getString() RAW, so every wait_chat needle either sits inside ONE color run or embeds the codes verbatim with an escaped dot to ride the regex path. Champion arm (royal_league_champion) still gates the lift button; preamble strips the OTHER six hall tags + frontier_warden_stirred so '#halls==1 / warden not stirred' holds, and resets frontier_tower_floor to 0 (a failed run parks a mid-climb score). Win waits ride the KNOWN TBCS stall / showdown wedge - a timeout there is almost certainly the stall, re-run before filing.

steps.comment: -- SITE NOTES: latch-placed bodies on the shipped RCT anchors - Jasper [3797.5 159 2959.5], Mira [3803.5 159 2959.5], Palmer [3800.5 159 2962.5]. ALL THREE tower character files carry a PLACEHOLDER-placement warning (atlas-intent facility Battle Tower [4026 64 3068] vs the shipped y=159 plateau anchor, never live-verified) - hence _probe_pending on the tp; do NOT guess a corrected Y. The manager anchors each fight's trainer to an armor stand it summons at the PLAYER, so all eight fights run at the lobby - no vertical movement despite the floor fiction. frontier_active region tick suspends Nuzlocke here, but it is NOT a SafeZone - day + regen below for the hardcore player. --
-- reset (idempotent re-runs): this hall's defeat tags + the climb score, PLUS the other six hall tags + the warden latch so the aggregate asserts stay exact --

steps.comment_: lazy-created by the Java on first climb; add-first so the reset set below can never hit an unknown objective on a fresh world (duplicate add fails harmlessly)

steps.comment: -- gate arm: champion. Stripped again at cleanup --
-- tp BEFORE any entity-adjacent work (latch NPCs spawn within 40b); long settle covers first-visit preset import --
-- leftover-state guards: close any stale dialog; stopbattle force-ends a stale battle (clean-player no-op) --
-- party reset: six empties then six lv-100 wonder Raikou (locked floors flatten clones so any team wins; Palmer is REAL - the wonder team handles him too; junk parties stall TBCS init) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
steps.comment_: WONDER TEAM (showrunner idea 2026-07-19, brain-fight solo-verified): pure Electric's only weakness is Ground -> Air Balloon negates it; Wonder Guard blocks everything else and the balloon never pops (nothing lands). Slot-1 Ice Beam: accurate, NO type is immune (an Electric lead vs enemy Ground-types would zero-damage-loop under first-legal-move autobattle).

execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon

steps.comment_: cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.comment: -- frontier residue strip (2026-07-18): failed runs skip cleanup, so cleared/defeat tags leak across attempts and reroute gated entries (the 'open Warden door' false alarm) --

-- brain latch re-arm (2026-07-19): a consumed fight leaves the brain BODY gone with #amb=1 - every later run finds nothing (all 7 brains were bodiless by round 4; three scenarios then false-matched STALE buffer win lines). Kill any stale body + reset the latch; the 40b approach respawns him fresh. --

-- leaked-battle sweep (2026-07-19): an aborted prior scenario can leave a live battle + a dead manager dispatch entry; stopbattle ends the battle (harmless no-op when clean) and the sleep lets the Java self-heal clear the dead dispatch (~2s) before the first hall command --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- settle + lane sanity: band tick re-derives the no_* inverses dropped-side; climb score must read 0 --
-- beat 1: lobby desk - Jasper's DEFAULT entry pitches the climb and carries the lift button (do:battle is gone). Any-of covers the rotating say[]; the button label is the stable assert --

expect_screen_text: Welcome to the ground floor. Nine floors, one lift, and every floor above is a promotion review. House teams both sides, flattened to the floor level - nothing you love is at stake on the way up.
The tower does not care who you toppled at the League. The lift opens one floor at a time, the roster re-mans every landing, and a loss resets the climb to this desk. So - climb.
House rules: floor two starts flattened at forty and the lock rises every landing to eighty-eight. The Tycoon holds floor nine and he does not flatten anything. Take the lift when you are ready.

steps.comment_: between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight)

steps.comment: -- floor 2 (fight 1/8): Jasper clone at lock 40. Banner -> fight -> purse -> lift line, all in one wait window (the lift button closes the dialog itself) --

steps.wait_chat: Floor §e2§7 of 9 — both sides flattened to §e40§7\. Purse §e300 CD§7
Purse paid: §e300 CD§7\.
The lift hums\. Floor §e3§7 is open

steps.comment_: defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win line lands - a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)

steps.comment: -- beat 2: Jasper BEATEN entry (re-manned voice, priority 20) still carries the lift - click it for floor 3. Re-find refreshes the approach context --

expect_screen_text: Floor cleared. You move up - and so do I. The roster re-mans every landing, so the lift will find me again on a higher floor at a higher lock. That is how this tower works.
You beat me down here and I signed the promotion myself. Do not get comfortable - I am already re-manned upstairs, and the ceiling only rises. The lift is waiting.
Cleared. The Company built these floors to sort people into ranks - climb high enough and you were somebody. Nobody sorts you now. Mind the one rule that survived: a loss resets the climb.

steps.comment: -- floor 3 (fight 2/8): Mira clone at lock 48 --

steps.wait_chat: Floor §e3§7 of 9 — both sides flattened to §e48§7\. Purse §e400 CD§7
Purse paid: §e400 CD§7\.
The lift hums\. Floor §e4§7 is open

steps.comment: -- beat 3 (no fight): Mira's beaten lane - re-manned voice, no battle button anymore; her leave button is the assert --

expect_screen_text: Floor three is yours - so I moved up. Re-manned and re-locked, the higher odd floors are still mine to hold. The lift to the Tycoon knows the way. Do not keep the top waiting.
Cleared. I used to think the corner office meant something. Now the office is empty and the only rank left is how high you climb before a loss resets it. You climb well.
You move up, I re-man higher. That is the arrangement - the roster rides the lift same as you. Save something for floor nine; Palmer does not flatten his team for anyone.

steps.comment: -- floors 4-8 (fights 3-7/8): same command surface via rcon execute-as (the lift button just runs this). Locks 56/64/72/80/88, purses 500-900, roster alternating Jasper/Mira clones --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative frontier tower climb

steps.comment: -- beat 4 (no fight): Palmer pre-fight lane before the summit ride - re-voiced default entry, battle button gone, leave button is the stable assert --

expect_screen_text: I am the top of the ladder. Eight floors of house teams stand between us, each flattened to its landing - then floor nine, where nothing is flattened and I fight at full strength. Earn the lift, one review at a time.
The Company that built this tower is gone; the climb is not. The lift opens one floor at a time and a loss resets the whole ladder. When it finally opens on nine, we settle who owns the top floor.
The floors below run handicapped - house teams, house locks. My floor does not. Whatever the lift delivers to the summit meets my real team, and most rides end back at the desk.

steps.comment: -- floor 9 (fight 8/8): the Tycoon at full authored strength - REAL fight, wonder team earns it. Win chain: defeat tags -> hall_cleared function -> purse -> top-floor line; score resets to 0 --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative frontier tower climb

steps.wait_chat: Floor §e9§7 of 9 — §cthe Tycoon fights at full strength§7\. Purse §e1200 CD§7
Purse paid: §e1200 CD§7\.
Top floor\. There is no promotion above this one\.

steps.comment: -- beat 5: Palmer's beaten lane - priority-20 entry gated on frontier_tower_cleared (manager sets the same tag the old onwin did); prose any-of covers all three rotating say lines incl. the folded win_line tail --

expect_screen_text: The chair behind the desk stays mine, but the floor is yours. Take the view in - most people never see the tower from this side.
You reached the summit and held it. I ran this tower back when the Company still built things for people to enjoy instead of things to squeeze them with. Good to see it still means the climb.
The office at the top is yours whenever you want it. Nobody hands out the corner anymore - people just take the stairs. You took them all. There is no promotion above this one - only the next hall.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: autobattle off; strip champion + everything this run earned; park the climb score at 0 --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
